problem: Cron was scheduled for 3 PM EEST today but never ran (last_run_at: null)

diagnosis.root_cause: Hermes gateway process was restarted at 18:13 today. The 15:00 execution window was likely missed because: (1) gateway may have been down or restarting during the 15:00-15:05 window, or (2) the cron was created at ~00:08 today and the scheduler may have needed a full cycle to register it. The cron's next_run_at correctly shows tomorrow 15:00.
